title: elsholtzia capituligera
intro: Elsholtzia capituligera, also known as Chinese mint or purple mint, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elsholtzia capituligera include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Elsholtzia capituligera is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
